productDisplayName: Lee Women Navy Blue Roxy Fit Jeans
description: Style Note One of the world's largest denim-wear Brands lee definitely knows how to craft their denims. This Summer the brand presents a range of denim jeans that you will want to live in. Its blended fabric composition ensures a super-stretchy feel that is guaranteed to not stretch -out over time. tops, t-shirts, tunics..... Whatever you pair it, a lot of complements will definitely come your way. Product DetailsNavy blue denim jeans, two scoop pockets in front with top stitch detail, insert coin pocket on right with dangling chains, yoke and two patch pockets at the back with arquette embroidery, waistband with loops, zippered fly with button, PU patch with branding at back waistbandMaterial and CareCotton blendMachine wash coldWarm ironSize and FitExtra low rise, slim and super skinny fitThe model( height 5'8"and waist 28") is wearing a size 28
